title: Validate XML signatures securely
description: XML signatures must be validated using secure methods to prevent signature wrapping and other attacks. Insecure validation can allow attackers to forge or manipulate signed XML data, leading to unauthorized access or data tampering. Always use robust libraries and recommended validation practices.
recommendation: Use secure XML signature validation libraries and follow best practices to prevent signature wrapping and related vulnerabilities.

checks.message: Use secure XML signature validation libraries and follow best practices to prevent signature wrapping and related vulnerabilities.
